required_skills: Market Trend Analysis and Demand Insights
Advanced Microsoft Excel and Forecast Modeling
preferred_skills: Risk Management and Demand Volatility Planning
responsibilities: Develop statistical demand forecasts using historical sales data, market intelligence, and business assumptions to improve planning accuracy.
Collaborate with sales, marketing, finance, and supply chain teams during S&OP cycles to align demand plans.
Analyze forecast performance metrics and identify drivers of demand variability to continuously improve forecast accuracy.
Build demand planning dashboards that provide visibility into forecast trends, customer demand patterns, and planning assumptions.
Conduct scenario planning exercises to evaluate demand impacts from promotions, seasonality, and changing market conditions.
Implement forecasting methodologies and predictive models that support proactive supply planning and inventory management decisions.
Monitor market trends, customer behavior, and product performance data to identify emerging demand opportunities and risks.
Prepare executive demand planning reports and recommendations that support strategic decision-making and business growth initiatives.
